posts.author: frossini (Fab Rossini)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have predefined options when creating my subitem so when we have recurring subitems I do not need to enter always the same things.
What I want is : When we click on add a new subiten, we would have a drop down of several options to chose from, or enter any text.
